## Summary
Brief description of what this PR adds or changes.

## Type of Change
- [ ] New content (new page or section)
- [ ] Content correction (fixing an error or outdated info)
- [ ] Technical fix (build, config, component issue)
- [ ] Other

## Content Checklist (for content PRs)
- [ ] Content is factually accurate and cites sources where applicable
- [ ] Regulatory information is current and jurisdiction is clearly noted
- [ ] Page follows the standard page structure (overview, red flags, checklist, interview questions)
- [ ] No placeholder text or "Coming Soon" content
- [ ] Links to related pages are included

## Testing
- [ ] `npm run build` passes without errors
- [ ] New pages appear correctly in sidebar navigation
- [ ] All internal links resolve correctly
